ENGINEERING
CAMPUS
MONGOLIA  ·  2020 — 2056  ·  GOBI RESTORATION

The world's first Gobi Desert engineering campus — combining smart irrigation, solar energy, and NASA satellite monitoring to halt desertification in Mongolia. 3 Land Arts, 157,857 trees.

Technology Stack

TECHNOLOGY & INNOVATION

IoT · AI · Drone · NASA Satellite

// STEP 06 — IRRIGATION TANK
RECYCLABLE IRRIGATION TANK
Sealed irrigation tanks made from recycled plastic bags — zero soil contamination, designed for harsh Gobi conditions.
MATERIALRecycled plastic
FEATURESSealed · Leak-proof
ECOLOGYZero plastic pollution
// STEP 07 — SOLAR ENERGY
RENEWABLE ENERGY SYSTEM
22 solar panels fully powering drip irrigation, pumps, and sensor systems. Autonomous system with Lithium-Ion battery storage.
PANEL COUNT22 ширхэг
CAPACITY10 kW
AREA42.5 м²
BATTERYLithium-Ion
// STEP 12 — TREES ТАРИХ
ULMUS PUMILA PLANTING
Planting drought-resistant Ulmus Pumila adapted to the arid Gobi climate. High biomass yield, absorbing 33,603,913 kg CO₂ per year.
SPECIESUlmus Pumila
CO₂ ABSORPTION33,603,913 kg/year
BIOMASS71,497.65 т
TOTAL COUNT157,857 мод
// STEP 13 — SMART IRRIGATION
SMART IoT IRRIGATION
Drip irrigation system that automatically opens valves by monitoring soil moisture, water level, and temperature via IoT LoRa network.
ТОМ PIPE18,000 м PVC
НАРИЙН PIPE1,200 м
PROTOCOLLoRa LTE + ChirpStack
SENSORSSoil · Water · Temp
// STEP 14 — DRONE MONITORING
AI DRONE MONITORING
AI-processed drone imagery detects tree count and health, logging data into the Tree Registry. Remote Sensing in partnership with NASA.
TECHNOLOGYAI + Drone Imagery
REGISTRYTree Registry
INDEXNDVI + LIDAR
PARTNERNASA Remote Sensing
// STEP 16 — SATELLITE MONITORING
NASA SATELLITE MONITORING
NASA MODIS, Sentinel-5P, and Sentinel-2 satellites measure NDVI, carbon absorption, and biomass accumulation in real time — processed by Martensite Analytica.
SATELLITENASA MODIS · Sentinel
INDEXNDVI · NDWI · Carbon
PROCESSINGMartensite Analytica
TECHNOLOGYLIDAR · Remote Sensing
